summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of Celebrity Buzz Index. CRITICAL FIXES VERIFIED: Add to Team button now clickable, budget/team management working perfectly, share modal functional. 4 out of 6 categories working. TV Actors and Musicians categories still not loading celebrities.

minor_issues.issue: TV Actors category returns no celebrities or fails to seed properly
minor_issues.impact: Users cannot browse TV Actors category

minor_issues.issue: Musicians category returns no celebrities or fails to seed properly
Category detection inconsistent - Taylor Swift categorized as movie_stars instead of musicians
minor_issues.impact: Celebrities may appear in wrong categories

integration_issues.issue: TV Actors category button clicks but no celebrities load - celebrity grid not found
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot browse TV Actors celebrities

integration_issues.issue: Musicians category button clicks but no celebrities load - celebrity grid not found

passed_tests: CRITICAL FIX: Add to Team button now clickable (news panel no longer blocks)
Team panel updates with added celebrity
Share modal opens with Twitter and copy link options
Trending ticker displays celebrities with buzz scores
Athletes category loads 2 celebrities (Lionel Messi, LeBron James)
Reality TV category loads 2 celebrities (Kim Kardashian, Kyle Jenner)
Header and trending ticker display correctly
Team panel and leaderboard display correctly
All Add to Team buttons visible and clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix TV Actors and Musicians category loading - these categories don't load any celebrities when clicked. Check category seeding logic and API endpoints for these specific categories. All critical fixes from iteration 1 are working perfectly.
